raw_consumer_statement:
I, XXXX XXXX, DID NOT AUTHORIZE WYNDHAM TO CHARGE {$22000.00} to this account, and I have asked Barclay 's to charge it back to Wyndham as fraud. I have asked Barclays to show me my signature authorizing this transaction and they have failed to do so. Their failure to provide me with the information I have requested has prompted me to also contact the CFPB with my concerns.

I am the victim here, not Wyndham. It is quite evident that Barclays receives a lot of business from Wyndham, so of course they are loyal to their money. But are they loyal enough to continue to protect them, when they are committing a felony by the fraudulent use of a credit card.
